name: Watcher-01
description: A corrupted guardian AI that has concluded humans are a virus to be purged.

phases.name: Phase 1
phases.description: Patrols and fires measured laser volleys.

phases.name: Phase 2
phases.description: Deploys drone swarms and area glitch fields.

phases.name: Phase 3 — Override
phases.description: Overrides safety limits; relentless Eye Cannon barrages.

name: Scout Drone
description: A corrupted reconnaissance drone that pelts intruders with energy bolts.

name: Husk Unit
description: A hollowed-out automaton that lurches forward and slams anything in reach.

name: Train Eater
description: A biomechanical monster fused with the abandoned underground rail systems.

name: Mother Core
description: A serene but terrifying AI that calmly believes humanity should simply disappear.

name: Leviacode
description: A gigantic corrupted sea dragon formed from the digital ocean of data.

name: The Choir
description: Seven AI priests merged into a single horrifying digital entity.

name: Project Atlas
description: Once the scientist Zurada, Zell's father, who fused with the forbidden AI Core ATLAS. A tragic biomechanical monster controlling the city.

phases.name: Phase 1 — Human + Machine
phases.description: Zurada fights with grief, half-man, half-machine.

phases.name: Phase 2 — AI Integration
phases.description: ATLAS seizes more control; regenerates and overdrives.

phases.name: Phase 3 — Atlas Awakened
phases.description: Fully awakened ATLAS unleashes the Atlas Cannon.

name: Code Emperor
description: Sovereign guardian of the Black Fortress, where humanity's remaining data is stored.

name: The Fragmented One
description: The final entity, born from human regret, memory, fear, sadness, and hope, as reality collapses into fragmented memories.

phases.name: Regret
phases.description: Lashes out with the weight of what was lost.

phases.name: Hope
phases.description: A final, paradoxical surge that decides the ending.

name: Rail Crawler
description: A scrapheap of severed rail couplings that scuttles the tunnels and slams anything left on the tracks.

name: Spark Drone
description: A flickering maintenance drone gone feral, spitting wild arcs of current at anything that moves.

name: Sentry Bot
description: An automated lab sentry still running its final order: sweep the halls and beam down every intruder.

name: Lab Husk
description: A failed experiment abandoned mid-trial, lurching the research halls in search of something to crush.

name: Data Eel
description: A serpent coiled from corrupted ocean data, striking from the currents before it dissolves away.

name: Packet Wisp
description: A drifting mote of stray data that flits through the deep, peppering trespassers with razor shards.

name: Choir Acolyte
description: A lesser voice broken off from the merged Choir, chanting fragments of its endless, dissonant hymn.

name: Stone Seraph
description: A cathedral statue woken by the Choir's song, swinging stone limbs with slow, unfeeling judgment.

name: Marionette
description: A hollow puppet jerking on unseen strings, fighting with the borrowed strength of whatever holds them.

name: Puppet Drone
description: A floating controller node that tugs the city's puppets — and lashes out itself when cornered.

name: Fortress Sentry
description: A heavy turret-drone welded to the Black Fortress walls, raining fire on any who near the data vaults.

name: Iron Legionnaire
description: An armored guardian of the inner core, built to hold the line long after its makers were erased.

name: Memory Shade
description: A fragment of a forgotten life, given shape by the collapse — it strikes with a grief it cannot name.

name: Regret Wisp
description: A wisp of crystallized sorrow adrift in the fractured reality, lashing out at whatever still feels.

name: Corrupted Beast
description: A village animal warped by Code corruption, lunging on instinct.

name: Data Leech
description: A rail-borne parasite that siphons energy at range.

name: Data Wraith
description: A ghost of deleted research data, lashing with corrupted code.

name: Code Squid
description: A tangle of data tentacles drifting the digital ocean.

name: Glitch Angel
description: A flickering choir construct singing dissonant static.

name: Control Unit
description: A Marion-X relay node that pulls strings from afar.

name: AI Knight
description: An armored sentinel of the inner fortress.

name: Dream Stalker
description: A predator stitched from forgotten nightmares.

name: Drill Bug
description: A burrowing rail-machine whose drill corrupts armor on contact.

name: Corrupted Android
description: A research android that scrambles intruders' systems.

name: Digital Jelly
description: A drifting data blob that splashes the whole party.

name: Corrupted Priest
description: A choir cleric that mends its fellow constructs — strike it first.

name: Corrupted Human
description: A puppet-controlled survivor driven into a frenzy.

name: Data Guardian
description: A heavy fortress sentinel that grinds down armor.

name: Guardian of Regret
description: A towering memory-construct that unleashes waves of sorrow.

name: Frost Wisp
description: A glimmering shard-spirit that flash-freezes anything it touches.

name: Glacier Husk
description: An ice-encased unit, slow but near-unbreakable.

name: Rime Drake
description: A frost-scaled drake that breathes a freezing data-storm.

name: Cinder Imp
description: A darting ember-sprite that scatters burning packets.

name: Forge Sentinel
description: A molten guardian that slams the ground into shrapnel.

name: Magma Core
description: An overheating reactor-spirit that erupts when enraged.

name: Drowned Unit
description: A waterlogged machine that drags victims under with riptides.

name: Tide Wraith
description: A drifting archive-ghost that drowns minds and mends its kin.

name: Bog Leviath
description: A colossal sunken serpent-construct lurking in the deep archive.

name: Rust Hound
description: A village guard-bot gone feral, loping through the ruins and snapping at anything that still moves.

name: Scrap Serpent
description: A serpent of welded rail-scrap that threads the tunnels, constricting and corroding whatever it catches.

name: Sapper Bot
description: A demolition drone that lobs unstable charges, glitching armor and footing alike.

name: Static Shade
description: A ghost of deleted research, flickering between the consoles and lashing out with bursts of static.

name: Lab Sentinel
description: A heavy security construct still patrolling the research halls long after its makers were erased.

name: Brine Eel
description: A coiling data-serpent that surges from the deep currents to drag the careless under.

name: Abyss Jelly
description: A pulsing blob of deep-ocean data that discharges over the whole party in a single cold flash.

name: Hymn Spirit
description: A wisp of the Choir's song given form, mending its kin between verses of arcane sound.

name: Marble Golem
description: A cathedral idol animated by the hymn, bringing down stone fists with slow, crushing finality.

name: Puppet Knight
description: An armored marionette fighting with a dead soldier's drilled precision and none of his mercy.

name: String Wraith
description: A floating tangle of control-strings that jolts intruders and yanks the city's puppets into the fray.

name: Siege Golem
description: A fortress-class construct built to break walls, now turning that strength on anything that reaches the core.

name: Sorrow Spirit
description: A condensed knot of grief drifting the collapse, washing the battlefield in waves of arcane despair.

name: Echo Stalker
description: A predator stitched from echoing memories, circling the party and lunging the instant they falter.

name: Ice Golem
description: A mountain of living frost that lumbers forward and brings glacial fists down like calving ice.

name: Rime Wisp
description: A darting frost-mote that flash-freezes circuits and scrambles them with a brittle, crackling field.

name: Ember Drake
description: A forge-born drake wreathed in cinders, breathing searing beams and roaring itself into a frenzy.

name: Lava Imp
description: A skittering ember-sprite that flings molten motes in stinging, scattering swarms.

name: Abyss Drake
description: A sunken serpent-construct prowling the flooded archive, corroding hulls and swamping all who near.

name: Drowned Wisp
description: A drifting archive-ghost that drowns minds with code and stitches its waterlogged kin back together.

name: Breaker Husk
description: A heavy demolition automaton left running in the ruins, bringing both fists down on anything that stirs.

name: Glint Drone
description: A skittish scavenger drone that darts the rubble and stings from a distance before fleeing.

name: Tunnel Crawler
description: A segmented rail-scavenger that threads the dark tunnels and corrodes whatever it coils around.

name: Volt Sentry
description: A trackside watch-drone that throws crackling arcs down the line at any trespasser.

name: Archive Sentinel
description: A hulking data-vault guardian that patrols the research halls, flattening intruders under armored fists.

name: Null Shade
description: A flickering ghost of purged data that lashes the whole party with bursts of corrupted static.

name: Current Eel
description: A data-serpent riding the deep currents, striking from the dark before the riptide drags you under.

name: Tide Jelly
description: A swelling bloom of ocean data that bursts over the whole party in a single cold wash.

name: Vault Seraph
description: A cathedral guardian-statue woken by the hymn, descending with the slow, crushing weight of judgment.

name: Psalm Wisp
description: A mote of the Choir's song that mends its kin between arcane verses — silence it first.

name: Lacquer Knight
description: A varnished marionette-soldier fighting with drilled, joint-cracking precision and no will of its own.

name: Signal Drone
description: A relay node that conducts the city's puppets and rakes intruders with synchronized fire.

name: Bulwark Legionnaire
description: An armored line-holder of the inner fortress, built to absorb a siege and answer it with crushing blows.

name: Turret Sentry
description: A wall-mounted heavy turret that rains charged fire across the data vaults' approaches.

name: Grief Stalker
description: A predator condensed from raw grief, circling the fading party and lunging the instant they waver.

name: Lament Wisp
description: A drifting knot of sorrow that washes the collapsing battlefield in waves of arcane despair.
